title: ShadowRoleConfig
description: Configuration for a KĀDI shadow agent role. Defines worktree paths, branch names, monitoring behavior, and optional LLM provider for a specific shadow role.

role.description: Shadow agent role identifier (matches corresponding worker agent role)

workerWorktreePath.description: Absolute path to the worker agent's git worktree that this shadow monitors

shadowWorktreePath.description: Absolute path to the shadow agent's git worktree for mirror commits

workerBranch.description: Git branch name in worker worktree to monitor for commits

shadowBranch.description: Git branch name in shadow worktree for mirror/backup commits

monitoringInterval.description: Interval in milliseconds for git ref polling (checking worker branch for new commits)

debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for filesystem change events before creating a shadow commit

provider.description: Optional LLM provider configuration for future shadow agent intelligence (anomaly analysis, smart rollback decisions)

maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens per LLM call

memory.description: Optional memory service configuration for persistent shadow agent state

enabled.description: Whether memory service is active for this shadow role

namespace.description: Memory namespace for isolating this shadow role's data
